title: Natural Gas Tax Repeal Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
crs_summary: Natural Gas Tax Repeal Act This bill eliminates a program administered by the Environmental Protection Agency that provides support for reducing methane emissions from the oil and gas sector. It also repeals a charge on methane emissions from facilities that contain petroleum and natural gas systems and emit 25,000 metric tons or more of greenhouse gases per year.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
